name: Pat's
teaser: My favorite Chicago bar pie. The very best possible version of a frozen Tombstone, cut into squares.
review: This isn't everyone's favorite thin-crust Chicago bar pie, but it's mine. Don't get mad at me but I always describe it as the very, very best possible version of a frozen Tombstone pizza cut into squares.
headsUp: Cut into squares, like God intended for this style.
update: My favorite bar pie in the city. Nothing has changed and nothing should.
address: 628 S Clark St, Chicago, IL 60605, USA
hours: Monday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 10:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Thursday: 10:00 AM – 11:00 PM · Friday: 10:00 AM – 12:00 AM · Saturday: 10:00 AM – 12:00 AM · Sunday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM
